<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please fill the sections below. -->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 bullets on what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires migration / ADR amendment)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] PoC manifest / tooling

## Linked issue

<!-- Closes #NNN or Refs #NNN. -->

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this? -->

- [ ] `mkdocs build --strict` passes
- [ ] `cd poc && make smoke` passes (if PoC code touched)
- [ ] New behaviour covered by an existing or new smoke test
- [ ] Manual verification (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] No secrets, no debug prints, no commented-out code
- [ ] No new top-level dependencies (or justified above)
- [ ] Public interfaces (env vars, namespaces, STAC properties) unchanged — or migration noted
- [ ] CHANGELOG-worthy changes mentioned in the summary

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should pay extra attention to, or known limitations. -->
